title: HitColor Plus
description: [26.1.x SUPPORT!] Change entity hit colors with smooth visual feedback
body:
HitColor adds customizable hit color effects for entities, improving combat feedback with clean visual effects.

Features:
- Custom hit colors
- Separate player and mob colors
- Adjustable opacity
- Lightweight & client-side
- Vanilla-friendly design
- Multi-version support

Perfect for PvP and enhanced combat visuals.
